title: Mole Boy Pickaxe Replacer
description: Replaces the pickaxes with Mole Boys
body:
This resource pack replaces all 6 of the "pickaxes" in the game with "Mole Boys"

 

The changes are visual and linguistic, meaning that your English language file will be altered as shown below:

 

Wooden Pickaxe -> Wooden Mole Boy

Stone Pickaxe -> Stone Mole Boy

Iron Pickaxe -> Iron Mole Boy

Golden Pickaxe -> Golden Mole Boy

Diamond Pickaxe -> Diamond Mole Boy

Netherite Pickaxe -> Netherite Mole Boy

 

You can see what Mole Boy looks like in the icon or the screenshots in the gallery.
